mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_generated_stories ( USER_ID, CHARACTER_NAME, STORY_TEXT, IMAGE_URL ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{characterName}, #{storyText}, #{imageUrl} )
INSERT INTO ai_generated_story_pages ( AI_STORY_ID, PAGE_NUMBER, CONTENT_TEXT, CONTENT_IMAGE, AI_IMAGE_DATA ) VALUES ( #{aiStoryId}, #{pageNumber}, #{contentText}, #{contentImage}, #{aiImageData} )
mapper.select: SELECT CONTENT_TEXT, CONTENT_IMAGE, AI_IMAGE_DATA FROM ai_generated_story_pages WHERE AI_STORY_ID = #{aiStoryId} AND PAGE_NUMBER = #{pageNumber}
SELECT AI_STORY_ID, USER_ID, TITLE, CHARACTER_NAME, STORY_TEXT, IMAGE_URL, CREATED_AT FROM ai_generated_stories WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
